creator: oahong@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Bjoern A. Zeeb from comment #47)

@Bjoern

I have a huawei hornor laptop with Ryzen 4500u and 16G memory. I have sent you my full verbose dmesg output via gmail.
 
%sysctl -a | egrep -i 'hw.machine|hw.model|hw.ncpu|hw.physmem'
hw.machine: amd64
hw.model: AMD Ryzen 5 4500U with Radeon Graphics         
hw.ncpu: 6
hw.physmem: 16477581312
hw.machine_arch: amd64
